title: ranunculus pastorum
intro: Ranunculus pastorum, also known as Ranunculus bulbosus, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as arthritis, gout, and skin conditions like eczema. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have shown potential in reducing inflammation and pain. Ranunculus pastorum can be prepared as a herbal remedy through decoction, infusion, or tincture, allowing it to be consumed as a tea, capsule, or applied topically as a cream or ointment.
